title: dendrobium mohlianum subsp. kolombangaricum
intro: Dendrobium mohlianum subsp. kolombangaricum is a subspecies of orchid native to the Philippines, characterized by its small, white flowers and slender growth habit. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits associated with Dendrobium mohlianum subsp. kolombangaricum include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and processed into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
